title: Spirit of Fight
description: A fantastic MC vanilla style combat mod with a plethora of actions！
body:
---

**Spirit of Fight** is a combat mod with an awesome action system and is based entirely on the vanilla models. Here you can enjoy the most extreme combat fun and experience the possibilities of the [new animation system](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark-core) we are carrying.
**Brand New Combat System**
 We have Dodge, Precision Dodge, Block, Precision Block, Combo, and a variety of special skills for each weapon class!
**100+ Hit Animations**
 We've added over 100 character hit animations, and instead of playing randomly, these animations are based on a combination of the direction of the opponent's attack and the part of the character's body that is hit!
**Replacement of the vanilla animation**
 We certainly won't forget the vanilla animation. We have replaced most of the vanilla animations. If there are any omissions, please let us know!
**Compatible with most other mods' weapons and armors!**
 We use Tag to compat other mods. Please note, however, that there will inevitably be some rendering incompatibilities, so if you guys find a compatibility issue, you can submit an issue to us and we'll try to fix it as best we can! (If there is a problem that can't be fixed, please forgive.)
--- **
🌾 Welcome to submit issues or your suggestions! 🌾

**
